---
name: Research spike
about: A time-boxed question to de-risk before design
title: "[spike] "
labels: ["type:spike", "status:todo", "role:research"]
---

## Question
The specific thing we need to know.

## Time-box
e.g. 2 hours.

## Decision this unblocks
What we'll decide once answered (links the PRD/ADR).

## Output
A note at `docs/research/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md` with a recommendation + sources.
